headline: MTB Shares Gain as Q2 Earnings Beat on Strong NII & Fee Income Growth
summary: M&T Bank shares rise after Q2 earnings top estimates as higher NII, fee income, loan growth and better credit quality offset rising expenses.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Dave Rochester   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $75 to $80.
